main.description: Update or create a branding asset blob. Requires admin authorization.

key.description: Branding asset key (mainLogo, favicon, siteTitle, etc.)

broadcaster.description: DID of the broadcaster. If not provided, uses the server's default broadcaster.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the blob (e.g., image/png, text/plain)

width.description: Image width in pixels (optional, for images only)

height.description: Image height in pixels (optional, for images only)

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The authenticated DID is not authorized to modify branding

errors.name: BlobTooLarge
errors.description: The blob exceeds the maximum size limit
